reasoning: UI enhancement affecting 2 pages (runs and compare) with 3 distinct features: uniform headers, showing all branch tests with status icons, and expandable test details with timeline layout. No external integrations, uses existing codebase patterns (tree-view, UI components). Estimated 6-10 files across frontend components and backend queries.

scope.notes: Changes affect runs page, compare page, test display components, and possibly data fetching. Cross-cutting but contained to frontend.

integrations.notes: No external integrations. Uses existing UI patterns (cards, tree-view, badges, etc.).

infrastructure.notes: No infrastructure changes. May need to modify data queries to fetch all tests (not just run tests) but no schema changes.

knowledge.notes: Codebase already has tree-view component, UI components (cards, badges, etc.), and expandable patterns. Timeline-ish layout can be built with existing primitives.

concerns: Consistency across two pages must be maintained
Non-run tests need clear visual differentiation
Expandable detail view must handle variable content (steps/assertions/screenshots)
risk.notes: Medium risk due to cross-page visual changes and new UI interaction pattern (expandable test details).

validation_recommendations.reasoning: UI changes across multiple pages require unit tests for component logic and integration tests for data fetching. No security-sensitive changes (no auth, payments, or user data handling).
